quotes.translation: 对我而言，无论灵魂伴侣信念与对应现实有何关联，它都强烈扭曲了上述两段赛斯语录所包含的理念。

quotes.text: (10:45.) Since your feelings follow your beliefs, various groups of them will appear to be senseless at times if you do not allow them free connection with opposing ideas that you may also hold.
quotes.translation: （10:45分）既然感受追随信念，若你不允许它们与你可能持有的对立观点自由联结，某些信念群组有时便会显得毫无意义。

quotes.text: If the members of such a rigid group believe that youth is innocent, then they will deny sexual experience as having any place in childhood, and alter their own memories to fit their beliefs.
quotes.translation: 若此僵化群体成员相信纯真属于少年，便会否认童年存在性体验，并篡改自身记忆以契合其信念。

quotes.text: When and if you manage to change your beliefs in that self-deceptive framework, then any suitable "forgotten" event from the past will be used as a catalyst. One would do as well as another.
quotes.translation: 当你终于能在自欺框架中改变信念时，任何适宜的"被遗忘"往事都将成为催化剂——任一往事皆可担此任。

quotes.text: The patterns I have suggested, therefore, will bring you far closer to an understanding of the reality of your being, and help you break down beliefs that cause personal and social division.
quotes.translation: 因此，我所建议的模式将使你更接近理解自身存在的实相，并帮助你打破那些造成个人与社会分裂的信念。

quotes.text: Your dream was indeed an excellent "omen." You were escaping from the jailhouse of negative beliefs, and you were delighted with the new easy motion of your body, once you had been released.
quotes.translation: 你的梦确实是一个绝佳的"预兆"。你正在逃离负面信念的牢笼，一旦获得释放，你便对自己身体轻松自如的新动作感到欣喜。

quotes.text: More "evidence" in quotes, of my independent existence will appear in direct proportion to your belief in it, and Ruburt's. For as you believe in me you allow me to manifest more completely.
quotes.translation: 更多关于我独立存在的"证据"（带引号），将与你及鲁柏对此的信念成正比显现。因为当你们相信我时，便允许我更完整地显化。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 8 of The Seth Material (Sessions 334-421)

quotes.text: 12. For one of the ways in which Seth explicates the idea that we're blind to information -- or beliefs -- that we don't agree with, see the 617th session for Chapter 3 of Personal Reality.
quotes.translation: 赛斯在《个人实相》第三章第617节中阐述了一个观点：我们对于不认同的信息或信念是视而不见的。

quotes.text: The paranoid has certain other beliefs. Let us take a hypothetical individual -- one who is convinced he has a healthy body, and is proud of mental stability. Let us call this friend Peter.
quotes.translation: 偏执狂患者还持有某些其他信念。让我们假设一个虚构人物——他坚信自己拥有健康的身体，并以心智稳定为荣。我们称这位朋友为彼得。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: It is doing so because Ruburt is giving it different "orders." He is giving it a different picture of the world, and he is doing that because he has finally changed many of his old beliefs.
quotes.translation: 之所以会这样，是因为鲁柏正在给它下达不同的"指令"。他正在向它呈现一幅不同的世界图景，而他之所以能做到这一点，是因为他终于改变了许多旧有的信念。

quotes.text: What I am about to explain is difficult. Purposely, it is not as yet in any of the books, simply because certain beliefs must be dispensed with before these ideas can be at all accepted.
quotes.translation: 我要解释的内容相当深奥。刻意尚未收录在任何书籍中，只因某些信念必须先行破除，这些概念才能被全然接纳。

quotes.text: If you do not understand the natural grace of your being1 then when you try some of the exercises given here you may automatically translate them into a quite limiting set of beliefs.
quotes.translation: 若你不了解自身存在的自然恩宠，那么当你尝试此处提供的某些练习时，可能会自动将其转化为一套相当局限的信念体系。

quotes.text: Please understand: I am not saying here that you have no conscious control over events, for they are formed by you in accordance with your feelings, beliefs, purposes, and intents.
quotes.translation: 请明白：我并非在此说你对事件没有意识上的控制，因为事件是由你根据你的感受、信念、目的和意图所形成的。

quotes.text: This is a given characteristic of life, regardless of the beliefs that may lead you to misinterpret the actions of nature, casting some of its creatures in a reprehensible light.
quotes.translation: 这是生命的固有特质，无论何种信念可能误导你曲解自然的行为，将某些生灵置于可谴责的境地。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 1

quotes.text: The false beliefs must be weeded out so that the conscious mind can become aware of its source once again, and open to the inner channels of splendor and power available to it.
quotes.translation: 必须剔除虚假信念，使意识心再度觉察其本源，并向内在的辉煌与力量通道敞开。

quotes.text: There is no event upon the face of the earth in which each of you has not played some part, however minute, because of the nature of your thoughts, beliefs, and expectations.
quotes.translation: 地球上没有一件事不是你们每个人以某种方式参与其中的，无论多么微小，因为你们的思想、信念和期待的本质使然。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: To see clearly into your own mind you must first of all unstructure your thoughts, follow them without judging them, without comparing them to the framework of your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 要清晰地看清自己的心智，你必须首先解构你的思想，跟随它们而不加评判，也不将它们与你信念的框架相比较。

quotes.text: ause at 10:15.) Chapter 2: "'Mass Meditations.' (A one-minute pause.) 'Health' Plans for Disease. Epidemics of Beliefs, and Effective Mental 'Inoculations' Against Despair."
quotes.translation: （10点15分停顿。）第二章：“'群体冥想'。（一分钟停顿。）疾病的'健康'计划。信念的流行病，以及对抗绝望的有效心理'接种'。”
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: The body, responding to his thoughts, feelings, and beliefs, has much more data to deal with, therefore, and must have a clear area in which concise action is possible.
quotes.translation: 身体回应他的思想、情感和信念，因此必须处理更多数据，并需要一个明确的区域，以便采取简洁的行动。
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: This is a sample of an invisible core belief at its worst. A person holding it will not trust a mate, family, friends, colleagues, country, or the world in general.
quotes.translation: 这是一个隐形核心信念最糟糕的范例。持有这种信念的人不会信任伴侣、家人、朋友、同事、国家，或整个世界。

quotes.text: This also signified your knowledge on other levels that Ruburt was becoming free of any negative beliefs that were the result of his relationship with his father.
quotes.translation: 这也表明你在其他层面知道，鲁柏正在摆脱因与父亲关系而产生的任何负面信念。

quotes.text: I am going to list some limiting false beliefs. If you find yourself agreeing with any of them, then recognize this as an area in which you must personally work.
quotes.translation: 我将列出一些限制性的错误信念。若你发现自己认同其中任何一条，请将其视为你必须亲自下功夫的领域。

quotes.text: Dictation: Let us go on to discuss the relationship between the inner self, your conscious beliefs, and your most intimate physical creation -- your human image.
quotes.translation: 口授：让我们继续讨论内在自我、你有意识的信念，以及你最亲密的物质创造——你的人体形象——之间的关系。

quotes.text: (9:27.) I cannot ignore those belief structures (intently) -- or what I say would literally be incomprehensible. All of this is automatically taken care of.
quotes.translation: （9点27分。）我不能忽视那些信念结构（专注地）——否则我所说的话实际上将无法被理解。这一切都自动得到了处理。

quotes.text: Your present beliefs govern the actualization of events. Creativity and experience are being formed moment by moment by each individual. Period, and break.
quotes.translation: 你当下的信念支配着事件的实际化。创造力和经验正由每个个体在每一刻被形成。句号，休息。

quotes.text: Now: Your doctors are also the victims of their own belief system, in other words.
quotes.translation: 现在：你的医生们也是他们自身信念系统的受害者，换句话说。

quotes.text: As a result, you see in nature only what you want to see, and you provide yourselves with a pattern or model of nature that conforms with your beliefs.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们在自然中只看见自己想看见的，并为自己提供符合信念的自然模式或模型。

quotes.text: You must realize that your conscious mind is competent, its ideas pertinent, and that your own beliefs affect and form your body and your experience.
quotes.translation: 你们必须认识到，你们的意识心智是胜任的，其想法是切中要害的，而你们自己的信念会影响并形成你们的身体与体验。

quotes.text: Your imagination of course fires your emotions, and it also follows your beliefs faithfully. As you think so you feel, and not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 你的想象当然会激发你的情绪，同时它也忠实地遵循你的信念。你如何思考便如何感受，而非相反。

quotes.text: Dictation: Any good demonstration of hypnosis will clearly show that the point of power is in the present, and that beliefs dictate your experience.
quotes.translation: 口授：任何良好的催眠示范都会清楚显示，力量之点就在当下，而信念主宰着你的体验。

related_concepts.name_en: The point of power is in the present

quotes.text: It may not seem that there is any connection between that situation and your beliefs involving color, and yet the two are intimately associated.
quotes.translation: 那情境与你对颜色的信念之间看似毫无关联，然而两者实则紧密相连。

quotes.text: Now: Generally speaking, those who advocate health foods or natural foods subscribe to some of the same overall beliefs held by your physicians.
quotes.translation: 现在：一般而言，那些提倡健康食品或天然食品的人，与你们的医生一样，都信奉某些相同的整体信念。

quotes.text: Your beliefs, then, are like hypnotic focuses. You reinforce them constantly through the normal inner talking in which you all indulge.
quotes.translation: 因此，你们的信念就像催眠的焦点。你们通过自己都沉迷其中的日常内在对话，不断强化这些信念。

quotes.text: "The entire structure of fears, of course, is based upon a belief in the sinful self and the sinful nature of the self's expression.
quotes.translation: "恐惧的整个结构，当然建立在相信自我有罪以及自我表达具有罪恶本质的信念之上。
quotes.book: Dreams, Evolution, and Value Fulfillment Vol. 2

quotes.text: These images are interior, yet because they are so a part of your beliefs you will see them exteriorized also in your experience.
quotes.translation: 这些意象是内在的，然而因为它们是你信念的一部分，你也会在经验中看到它们被外化。

quotes.text: The whole following sentence to be underlined: And as long as you hold that conscious belief you will experience it as reality.
quotes.translation: 整句划线：只要你持有那个有意识的信念，你就会将它体验为实相。

quotes.text: If he does not follow through with his beliefs, then the meeting will result in failure as far as his hopes are concerned.
quotes.translation: 如果他不贯彻自己的信念，那么就他的期望而言，这次会面将以失败告终。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 2 of The Seth Material (Sessions 43-85)

quotes.text:
"MASS MEDITATIONS." "HEALTH" PLANS FOR DISEASE.
EPIDEMICS OF BELIEFS, AND EFFECTIVE MENTAL
"INOCULATIONS" AGAINST DESPAIR
quotes.translation: “集体冥想。”针对疾病的“健康”计划。信念的流行，以及对抗绝望的有效心理“接种”
quotes.book: The Individual and the Nature of Events

quotes.text: Those that you experience are the result of false beliefs. Following this is the idea that I have already mentioned:
quotes.translation: 你所经历的这些，都是错误信念的结果。紧接着是我已经提过的那个观念：

quotes.text: Now, dictation: Not long ago Ruburt was presented with a demonstration embodying the nature and power of beliefs.
quotes.translation: 现在，口授：不久前，鲁柏经历了一场体现信念本质与力量的示范。

quotes.text: According to your energy, power and intensity, you can help change the beliefs of many people, of course.
quotes.translation: 根据你的能量、力量与强度，你当然可以帮助改变许多人的信念。

quotes.text: Now: Your conscious ideas, expectations and beliefs direct the health and activity of the cells. Period.
quotes.translation: 现在：你有意识的观念、期望和信念直接引导着细胞的健康与活动。句号。

quotes.text: Creating your own reality -- How to free yourself from limiting beliefs and create the life you want.
quotes.translation: 创造你自己的实相——如何从限制性信念中解脱，并创造你想要的生活。
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 1 of The Seth Material (Sessions 1-42)

quotes.text: （After a moment Bill said he thought his beliefs regarding religion were more or less traditional.）
quotes.translation: （片刻后，比尔说他觉得他对宗教的信念或多或少是传统的。）
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 5 of The Seth Material (Sessions 199-239)

quotes.text: Your conscious beliefs direct the functioning of your body. It is not the other way around.
quotes.translation: 你有意识的信念主导着你身体的功能运作，而非相反。

quotes.text: We will resume dictation. Chapter Two: "Reality and Personal Beliefs."
quotes.translation: 我们将继续口授。第二章：「实相与个人信念。」

quotes.text: Creating your own reality How to free yourself from limiting beliefs
quotes.translation: 创造你自己的实相 如何从限制性信念中解脱
quotes.book: The Early Sessions: Book 7 of The Seth Material (Sessions 281-333)

quotes.text: The Body's Reasoning as Logic. Belief Systems.
quotes.translation: 身体的推理即逻辑。信念系统。
